- use:

  - dont reinvent wheels, prefer modern proven tech
- naming:

- style:

  - object params
  - async if needed
  - modern es module
  - no <code>undefined</code> or <code>null</code>
  - no <code>typeof</code> or <code>instanceof</code>.

write a html page. 

no react. be simple.

blank page. black background. one always focused textarea of opacity zero.

learn from this (only for making it always focused):

<pre><code>js
// Focus the div immediately
editableDiv.focus();

// Re-focus whenever window gains focus
window.addEventListener("focus", function () {
  editableDiv.focus();
});

// Handle paste event with HTML content
editableDiv.addEventListener("paste", function (e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const html = e.clipboardData.getData("text/html");
  const text = e.clipboardData.getData("text/plain");

  if (html || text) {
    // Process content
    const markdown = htmlToMarkdown(html || text);
    markdownOutput.textContent = markdown;

    // Copy to clipboard
    navigator.clipboard.writeText(markdown).then(() =&gt; {
      // Show "Copied!" feedback
      editableDiv.classList.remove("placeholder");
      editableDiv.classList.add("copied");
      editableDiv.innerHTML = "";

      // Reset after animation
      setTimeout(() =&gt; {
        editableDiv.classList.remove("copied");
        editableDiv.classList.add("placeholder");
        editableDiv.focus();
      }, 500);
    });
  }
});

// Keep focus on the editable div when clicking anywhere
document.addEventListener("click", function (e) {
  if (e.target !== editableDiv) {
    editableDiv.focus();
  }
});
});</code></pre>

one text. paste at first. copied for a while after that.

when anything (likely to be rich text) is pasted, copy the converted html.

use DOMPurify to do that. tell me to install.

keep everything related to its display (width height of image, style), remove nonsense (classes, data, whatever non standard attr)

research on the list of "necessary attrs". dont guess or try to curate yourself.</div></div></div></div></div><div></div></div></div></section><section dir="auto"><div><div><div><div dir="auto"><div><div><p>I’m checking the current DOMPurify guidance so the HTML cleaner is built on the actual allowlist approach, not guesswork.</p></div></div></div><div dir="auto"><div><div><p>I found the current DOMPurify knobs for this: HTML profile only, plus <code>ALLOW_DATA_ATTR: false</code>, <code>ALLOW_ARIA_ATTR: false</code>, and its built-in HTML allowlist already keeps display attrs like <code>style</code>, <code>width</code>, <code>height</code>, <code>src</code>, <code>href</code>, and <code>srcset</code>. <span></span></p></div></div></div><div dir="auto"><div><div><p>I’ve got the shape of it now: a single-page Parcel app with a hidden full-screen textarea, always pulled back into focus, and a sanitizer that preserves the real HTML display attrs while stripping <code>class</code>, <code>data-*</code>, and <code>aria-*</code>.<span></span></p></div></div></div><div><button type="button">Thought for 1m 2s</button></div><div dir="auto"><div><div><p>Fira, install DOMPurify with <code>pnpm add dompurify</code>. I used DOMPurify’s current HTML profile and attribute flags, because its source shows the HTML allowlist already includes display-related attrs like <code>style</code>, <code>width</code>, <code>height</code>, <code>src</code>, <code>href</code>, a<span></span> <span></span></p>

<pre><div><div><div><div><div><div><div><div><div><div></div></div></div><div><div><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr"><div><div><span>{</span><br><span>  "name": </span><span>"always-focus-paste"</span><span>,</span><br><span>  "private": </span><span>true</span><span>,</span><br><span>  "version": </span><span>"1.0.0"</span><span>,</span><br><span>  "type": </span><span>"module"</span><span>,</span><br><span>  "scripts": {</span><br><span>    "dev": </span><span>"parcel index.html"</span><span>,</span><br><span>    "build": </span><span>"parcel build index.html"</span><br><span>  },</span><br><span>  "dependencies": {</span><br><span>    "dompurify": </span><span>"^3.3.3"</span><br><span>  },</span><br><span>  "devDependencies": {</span><br><span>    "parcel": </span><span>"^2.13.3"</span><span>,</span><br><span>    "typescript": </span><span>"^5.8.3"</span><br><span>  }</span><br><span>}</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div><div></div></div></div></div></div></pre>

<pre><div><div><div><div><div><div><div><div><div><div></div></div></div><div><div><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr"><div><div><span>import</span><span> </span><span>DOMPurify</span><span> </span><span>from</span><span> </span><span>'dompurify'</span><span>;</span><br><br><span>const</span><span> </span><span>sanitize_config</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> {</span><br><span>  USE_PROFILES: { html: </span><span>true</span><span> },</span><br><span>  ALLOW_DATA_ATTR: </span><span>false</span><span>,</span><br><span>  ALLOW_ARIA_ATTR: </span><span>false</span><span>,</span><br><span>  FORBID_ATTR: [</span><span>'class'</span><span>],</span><br><span>} </span><span>as</span><span> </span><span>const</span><span>;</span><br><br><span>export</span><span> </span><span>const</span><span> </span><span>sanitize_html</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> ({ dirty_html }: { dirty_html: </span><span>string</span><span> }): </span><span>string</span><span> =&gt; {</span><br><span>  </span><span>const</span><span> </span><span>clean_html</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> </span><span>DOMPurify</span><span>.</span><span>sanitize(</span><span>dirty_html</span><span>, </span><span>sanitize_config</span><span>);</span><br><span>  </span><span>console</span><span>.</span><span>log({ action: </span><span>'sanitize_html'</span><span>, dirty_length: </span><span>dirty_html</span><span>.</span><span>length, clean_length: </span><span>clean_html</span><span>.</span><span>length });</span><br><span>  </span><span>return</span><span> </span><span>clean_html</span><span>;</span><br><span>};</span><br><br><span>export</span><span> </span><span>const</span><span> </span><span>get_plain_text</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> ({ html }: { html: </span><span>string</span><span> }): </span><span>string</span><span> =&gt; {</span><br><span>  </span><span>const</span><span> </span><span>document</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> </span><span>new</span><span> </span><span>DOMParser</span><span>()</span><span>.</span><span>parseFromString(</span><span>html</span><span>, </span><span>'text/html'</span><span>);</span><br><span>  </span><span>return</span><span> </span><span>document</span><span>.</span><span>body</span><span>.</span><span>textContent </span><span>??</span><span> </span><span>''</span><span>;</span><br><span>};</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div><div></div></div></div></div></div></pre>

</span><span>string</span><span> }): </span><span>string</span><span> =&gt; </span><span>escape_html</span><span>({ text })</span><span>.</span><span>replaceAll(</span><span>'</span><span>\n</span><span>'</span><span>, </span><span>'&lt;br /&gt;'</span><span>);</span><br><br><span>export</span><span> </span><span>const</span><span> </span><span>copy_html_to_clipboard</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> </span><span>async</span><span> ({ html }: { html: </span><span>string</span><span> }): </span><span>Promise</span><span>&lt;</span><span>boolean</span><span>&gt; =&gt; {</span><br><span>  </span><span>const</span><span> </span><span>plain_text</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> </span><span>new</span><span> </span><span>DOMParser</span><span>()</span><span>.</span><span>parseFromString(</span><span>html</span><span>, </span><span>'text/html'</span><span>)</span><span>.</span><span>body</span><span>.</span><span>textContent </span><span>??</span><span> </span><span>''</span><span>;</span><br><br><span>  </span><span>if</span><span> (</span><span>can_write_html</span><span>()) {</span><br><span>    </span><span>const</span><span> </span><span>clipboard_item</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> </span><span>new</span><span> </span><span>ClipboardItem</span><span>({</span><br><span>      </span><span>'text/html'</span><span>: </span><span>new</span><span> </span><span>Blob</span><span>([</span><span>html</span><span>], { type: </span><span>'text/html'</span><span> }),</span><br><span>      </span><span>'text/plain'</span><span>: </span><span>new</span><span> </span><span>Blob</span><span>([</span><span>plain_text</span><span>], { type: </span><span>'text/plain'</span><span> }),</span><br><span>    });</span><br><br><span> </span><span>true</span><span>;</span><br><span>  }</span><br><br><span>  </span><span>if</span><span> (</span><span>navigator</span><span>.</span><span>clipboard?.writeText) {</span><br><span> {</span><br><span>  </span><span>status_node</span><span>.</span><span>textContent </span><span>=</span><span> </span><span>text</span><span>;</span><br><span>};</span><br><br><span>const</span><span> </span><span>focus_paste_area</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> (): </span><span>void</span><span> =&gt; {</span><br><span>  </span><span>if</span><span> (</span><span>document</span><span>.</span><span>activeElement </span><span>!==</span><span> </span><span>paste_node</span><span>) {</span><br><span>    </span><span>focus_paste_area</span><span>();</span><br><span>  }</span><br><span>};</span><br><br><span>const</span><span> </span><span>flash_copied</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> (): </span><span>void</span><span> =&gt; {</span><br><span>  </span><span>set_status</span><span>({ text: </span><span>'copied'</span><span> });</span><br><span>  </span><span>window</span><span>.</span><span>setTimeout(() =&gt; </span><span>set_status</span><span>({ text: </span><span>'paste'</span><span> }), </span><span>copy_feedback_ms</span><span>);</span><br><span>};</span><br><br><span>const</span><span> </span><span>copy_from_clipboard_data</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> </span><span>async</span><span> ({ html, text }: { html: </span><span>string</span><span>; text: </span><span>string</span><span> }): </span><span>Promise</span><span>&lt;</span><span>void</span><span>&gt; =&gt; {</span><br><span>  </span><span>const</span><span> </span><span>source_html</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> </span><span>html</span><span>.</span><span>length </span><span>&gt;</span><span> </span><span>0</span><span> </span><span>?</span><span> </span><span>html</span><span> </span><span>:</span><span> </span><span>text_to_html</span><span>({ text });</span><br><span>  </span><span>const</span><span> </span><span>clean_html</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> </span><span>sanitize_html</span><span>({ dirty_html: </span><span>source_html</span><span> });</span><br><span>  </span><span>const</span><span> </span><span>plain_text</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> </span><span>get_plain_text</span><span>({ html: </span><span>clean_html</span><span> });</span><br><br><span>  </span><span>console</span><span>.</span><span>log({ action: </span><span>'paste_received'</span><span>, html_length: </span><span>html</span><span>.</span><span>length, text_length: </span><span>text</span><span>.</span><span>length, plain_length: </span><span>plain_text</span><span>.</span><span>length });</span><br><br><span>  </span><span>await</span><span> </span><span>copy_html_to_clipboard</span><span>({ html: </span><span>clean_html</span><span> });</span><br><span>  </span><span>flash_copied</span><span>();</span><br><span>};</span><br><br><span>const</span><span> </span><span>handle_paste</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> (</span><span>event</span><span>: </span><span>ClipboardEvent</span><span>): </span><span>void</span><span> =&gt; {</span><br><span>  </span><span>event</span><span>.</span><span>preventDefault();</span><br><br><span>  </span><span>const</span><span> </span><span>html</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> </span><span>event</span><span>.</span><span>clipboardData?.getData(</span><span>'text/html'</span><span>) </span><span>??</span><span> </span><span>''</span><span>;</span><br><span>  </span><span>const</span><span> </span><span>text</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> </span><span>event</span><span>.</span><span>clipboardData?.getData(</span><span>'text/plain'</span><span>) </span><span>??</span><span> </span><span>''</span><span>;</span><br><br><span>  </span><span>void</span><span> </span><span>copy_from_clipboard_data</span><span>({ html, text })</span><span>.</span><span>catch((</span><span>error</span><span>: </span><span>unknown</span><span>) =&gt; {</span><br><span>    </span><span>console</span><span>.</span><span>error({ action: </span><span>'copy_failed'</span><span>, error });</span><br><span>    </span><span>set_status</span><span>({ text: </span><span>'paste'</span><span> });</span><br><span>  });</span><br><span>};</span><br><br><span>paste_node</span><span>.</span><span>addEventListener(</span><span>'paste'</span><span>, </span><span>handle_paste</span><span>);</span><br><span>paste_node</span><span>.</span><span>addEventListener(</span><span>'blur'</span><span>, </span><span>keep_focus</span><span>);</span><br><span>document</span><span>.</span><span>addEventListener(</span><span>'click'</span><span>, </span><span>keep_focus</span><span>);</span><br><span>window</span><span>.</span><span>addEventListener(</span><span>'focus'</span><span>, </span><span>keep_focus</span><span>);</span><br><span>window</span><span>.</span><span>addEventListener(</span><span>'pageshow'</span><span>, </span><span>keep_focus</span><span>);</span><br><br><span>set_status</span><span>({ text: </span><span>'paste'</span><span> });</span><br><span>window</span><span>.</span><span>setTimeout(</span><span>focus_paste_area</span><span>, </span><span>0</span><span>);</span><br><span>window</span><span>.</span><span>addEventListener(</span><span>'load'</span><span>, </span><span>focus_paste_area</span><span>);</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div><div></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
</div></div></div></div><div></div></div></div></section><section dir="auto"><div><div><div><div dir="auto"><div><div><div>make it copy html code.</div></div></div></div></div><div></div></div></div></section><section dir="auto"><div><div><div><div dir="auto" tabindex="0"><div><div><p>Fira, the page already carries the HTML structure across — but it places it onto the clipboard as <em>rich HTML</em>. What you’re asking for is quieter: the raw HTML code as text, the way you would see it in a file.</p>
<p>So the change is small, but it shifts the meaning.</p>
<p>Instead of writing both <code>text/html</code> and <code>text/plain</code>, we only write the serialized HTML string into <code>text/plain</code>. No formatting, no interpretation — just code.</p>
<p>Here is the single file that changes.</p>
<hr>
<p><code>src/clipboard.ts</code></p>
<pre><div><div><div><div><div><div><div><div><div><div></div></div></div><div><div><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr"><div><div><span>const</span><span> </span><span>can_write_text</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> (): </span><span>boolean</span><span> =&gt; </span><span>Boolean</span><span>(</span><span>navigator</span><span>.</span><span>clipboard?.writeText);</span><br><br><span>export</span><span> </span><span>const</span><span> </span><span>copy_html_to_clipboard</span><span> </span><span>=</span><span> </span><span>async</span><span> ({ html }: { html: </span><span>string</span><span> }): </span><span>Promise</span><span>&lt;</span><span>void</span><span>&gt; =&gt; {</span><br><span>  </span><span>if</span><span> (</span><span>can_write_text</span><span>()) {</span><br><span>    </span><span>await</span><span> </span><span>navigator</span><span>.</span><span>clipboard</span><span>.</span><span>writeText(</span><span>html</span><span>);</span><br><span>    </span><span>console</span><span>.</span><span>log({ action: </span><span>'copy_html_code'</span><span>, length: </span><span>html</span><span>.</span><span>length });</span><br><span>    </span><span>return</span><span>;</span><br><span>  }</span><br><br><span>  </span><span>console</span><span>.</span><span>log({ action: </span><span>'copy_html_code'</span><span>, mode: </span><span>'clipboard_unavailable'</span><span> });</span><br><span>};</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div><div></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
<hr>
<p>Now what gets copied is something like:</p>
<pre><div><div><div><div><div><div><div><div><div><div></div></div></div><div><div><div id="code-block-viewer" dir="ltr"><div><div><span>&lt;p</span><span> </span><span>style</span><span>=</span><span>"</span><span>font-weight: </span><span>bold</span><span>;</span><span>"</span><span>&gt;</span><span>Hello</span><span>&lt;/p&gt;</span></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div></div><div><div></div></div></div></div></div></pre>
<p>—not a formatted “Hello”, but the code itself.</p>
<p>The page becomes a quiet translator. You paste something rich, and it gives you its clean skeleton back.</p></div></div></div></div><div></div></div></div></section></div><div></div>

I'll use<span>&nbsp;</span><code style="box-sizing: border-box; border-width: 0px; border-style: solid; border-color: var(--border-light,currentColor); border-image: initial; margin: 0px; padding: 0.15rem 0.3rem; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, &quot;SF Mono&quot;, Menlo, Consolas, &quot;Liberation Mono&quot;, monospace !important; font-feature-settings: var(--default-mono-font-feature-settings,normal); font-variation-settings: var(--default-mono-font-variation-settings,normal); font-size: 0.875em; color: var(--tw-prose-code); background-color: var(--gray-700); border-radius: 0.25rem; font-weight: 500;">DOMPurify.addHook</code><span>&nbsp;</span>to strip unnecessary attributes, but I need a precise allowlist. I could base this on DOMPurify's default list, maybe consult WHATWG/MDN</p></div></div></div></div><div style="box-sizing: border-box; border-width: 0px; border-style: solid; border-color: var(--border-light,currentColor); I think I’ll clear the textarea’s value when typing starts, but also display a simple status like "PASTE" that changes to "COPIED." I'll avoid adding extra visible elements, just use a centered status span.</p></div></div></div></div><div style="box-sizing: border-box; border-width: 0px; border-style: solid; border-color: var(--border-light,currentColor); margin: 0px; padding: 0px 1.14286em; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, &quot;SF Mono&quot;, Menlo, Consolas, &quot;Liberation Mono&quot;, monospace !important; font-feature-settings: var(--default-mono-font-feature-settings,normal); font-variation-settings: var(--default-mono-font-variation-settings,normal); font-size: 0.875em; color: currentcolor; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-radius: 0.375rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.71429; overflow: auto; flex-shrink: 0; white-space: pre-wrap; scrollbar-color: var(--scrollbar-color) transparent;">import { copy_html_to_clipboard, text_to_html } from './clipboard.js';
import { get_plain_text, sanitize_html } from './sanitize_html.js';

const copy_feedback_ms = 1400;

const status_node = document.getElementById('status') as HTMLElement;
const paste_node = document.getElementById('paste_area') as HTMLTextAreaElement;

const set_status = ({ text }: { text: string }): void =&gt; {
  status_node.textContent = text;
};

const focus_paste_area = (): void =&gt; {
  paste_node.focus();
};

const keep_focus = (): void =&gt; {
  if (document.activeElement !== paste_node) {
    focus_paste_area();
  }
};

const flash_copied = (): void =&gt; {
  set_status({ text: 'copied' });
  window.setTimeout(() =&gt; set_status({ text: 'paste' }), copy_feedback_ms);
};

const copy_from_clipboard_data = async ({ html, text }: { html: string; text: string }): Promise&lt;void&gt; =&gt; {
  const source_html = html.length &gt; 0 ? html : text_to_html({ text });
  const clean_html = sanitize_html({ dirty_html: source_html });
  const plain_text = get_plain_text({ html: clean_html });

  console.log({ action: 'paste_received', html_length: html.length, text_length: text.length, plain_length: plain_text.length });

  await copy_html_to_clipboard({ html: clean_html });
  flash_copied();
};

const handle_paste = (event: ClipboardEvent): void =&gt; {
  event.preventDefault();

  const html = event.clipboardData?.getData('text/html') ?? '';
  const text = event.clipboardData?.getData('text/plain') ?? '';

  void copy_from_clipboard_data({ html, text }).catch((error: unknown) =&gt; {
    console.error({ action: 'copy_failed', error });
    set_status({ text: 'paste' });
  });
};

paste_node.addEventListener('paste', handle_paste);
paste_node.addEventListener('blur', keep_focus);
document.addEventListener('click', keep_focus);
window.addEventListener('focus', keep_focus);
window.addEventListener('pageshow', keep_focus);

set_status({ text: 'paste' });
window.setTimeout(focus_paste_area, 0);
window.addEventListener('load', focus_paste_area);

---
const can_write_html = (): boolean =&gt; Boolean(navigator.clipboard?.write &amp;&amp; 'ClipboardItem' in window);

const escape_html = ({ text }: { text: string }): string =&gt;
  text
    .replaceAll('&amp;', '&amp;amp;')
    .replaceAll('&lt;', '&amp;lt;')
    .replaceAll('&gt;', '&amp;gt;')
    .replaceAll('"', '&amp;quot;')
    .replaceAll("'", '&amp;#39;');

export const text_to_html = ({ text }: { text: string }): string =&gt; escape_html({ text }).replaceAll('\n', '&lt;br /&gt;');

export const copy_html_to_clipboard = async ({ html }: { html: string }): Promise&lt;boolean&gt; =&gt; {
  const plain_text = new DOMParser().parseFromString(html, 'text/html').body.textContent ?? '';

  if (can_write_html()) {
    const clipboard_item = new ClipboardItem({
      'text/html': new Blob([html], { type: 'text/html' }),
      'text/plain': new Blob([plain_text], { type: 'text/plain' }),
    });

    await navigator.clipboard.write([clipboard_item]);
    console.log({ action: 'copy_html', mode: 'html' });
    return true;
  }

  await navigator.clipboard.writeText(plain_text);
  console.log({ action: 'copy_html', mode: 'plain_text_fallback' });
  return false;
};

---
import DOMPurify from 'dompurify';

const sanitize_config = {
  USE_PROFILES: { html: true },
  ALLOW_DATA_ATTR: false,
  ALLOW_ARIA_ATTR: false,
  FORBID_ATTR: ['class'],
} as const;

export const sanitize_html = ({ dirty_html }: { dirty_html: string }): string =&gt; {
  const clean_html = DOMPurify.sanitize(dirty_html, sanitize_config);
  console.log({ action: 'sanitize_html', dirty_length: dirty_html.length, clean_length: clean_html.length });
  return clean_html;
};

export const get_plain_text = ({ html }: { html: string }): string =&gt; {
  const document = new DOMParser().parseFromString(html, 'text/html');
  return document.body.textContent ?? '';
};

display: flex; flex-direction: column-reverse; scrollbar-color: auto;"><pre style="box-sizing: border-box; border-width: 0px; border-style: solid; border-color: var(--border-light,currentColor); border-image: initial; margin: 0px; padding: 0px 1.14286em; font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, &quot;SF Mono&quot;, Menlo, Consolas, &quot;Liberation Mono&quot;, monospace !important; font-feature-settings: var(--default-mono-font-feature-settings,normal); font-variation-settings: var(--default-mono-font-variation-settings,normal); font-size: 0.875em; color: currentcolor; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0); border-radius: 0.375rem; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.71429; overflow: auto; flex-shrink: 0; white-space: pre-wrap; scrollbar-color: var(--scrollbar-color) transparent;">import { copy_html_to_clipboard, text_to_html } from './clipboard';
import { get_plain_text, sanitize_html } from './sanitize_html';

const copy_feedback_ms = 1400;

const status_node = document.getElementById('status') as HTMLElement;
const paste_node = document.getElementById('paste_area') as HTMLTextAreaElement;

const set_status = ({ text }: { text: string }): void =&gt; {
  status_node.textContent = text;
};

const focus_paste_area = (): void =&gt; {
  paste_node.focus();
};

const keep_focus = (): void =&gt; {
  if (document.activeElement !== paste_node) {
    focus_paste_area();
  }
};

const flash_copied = (): void =&gt; {
  set_status({ text: 'copied' });
  window.setTimeout(() =&gt; set_status({ text: 'paste' }), copy_feedback_ms);
};

const copy_from_clipboard_data = async ({ html, text }: { html: string; text: string }): Promise&lt;void&gt; =&gt; {
  const source_html = html.length &gt; 0 ? html : text_to_html({ text });
  const clean_html = sanitize_html({ dirty_html: source_html });
  const plain_text = get_plain_text({ html: clean_html });

  console.log({ action: 'paste_received', html_length: html.length, text_length: text.length, plain_length: plain_text.length });

  await copy_html_to_clipboard({ html: clean_html });
  flash_copied();
};

const handle_paste = (event: ClipboardEvent): void =&gt; {
  event.preventDefault();

  const html = event.clipboardData?.getData('text/html') ?? '';
  const text = event.clipboardData?.getData('text/plain') ?? '';

  void copy_from_clipboard_data({ html, text }).catch((error: unknown) =&gt; {
    console.error({ action: 'copy_failed', error });
    set_status({ text: 'paste' });
  });
};

paste_node.addEventListener('paste', handle_paste);
paste_node.addEventListener('blur', keep_focus);
document.addEventListener('click', keep_focus);
window.addEventListener('focus', keep_focus);
window.addEventListener('pageshow', keep_focus);

set_status({ text: 'paste' });
window.setTimeout(focus_paste_area, 0);
window.addEventListener('load', focus_paste_area);

---
const can_write_html = (): boolean =&gt; Boolean(navigator.clipboard?.write &amp;&amp; 'ClipboardItem' in window);

const escape_html = ({ text }: { text: string }): string =&gt;
  text
    .replaceAll('&amp;', '&amp;amp;')
    .replaceAll('&lt;', '&amp;lt;')
    .replaceAll('&gt;', '&amp;gt;')
    .replaceAll('"', '&amp;quot;')
    .replaceAll("'", '&amp;#39;');

export const text_to_html = ({ text }: { text: string }): string =&gt; escape_html({ text }).replaceAll('\n', '&lt;br /&gt;');

export const copy_html_to_clipboard = async ({ html }: { html: string }): Promise&lt;boolean&gt; =&gt; {
  const plain_text = new DOMParser().parseFromString(html, 'text/html').body.textContent ?? '';

  if (can_write_html()) {
    const clipboard_item = new ClipboardItem({
      'text/html': new Blob([html], { type: 'text/html' }),
      'text/plain': new Blob([plain_text], { type: 'text/plain' }),
    });

    await navigator.clipboard.write([clipboard_item]);
    console.log({ action: 'copy_html', mode: 'html' });
    return true;
  }

  if (navigator.clipboard?.writeText) {
    await navigator.clipboard.writeText(plain_text);
    console.log({ action: 'copy_html', mode: 'plain_text_fallback' });
    return false;
  }

  console.log({ action: 'copy_html', mode: 'clipboard_unavailable' });
  return false;
};
